# Image2Ad

> Image2Ad turns plain product photos into ready-to-use ads. Upload a photo (or start from a text prompt), and AI generates professional ad creative - images, video, and music - in about 10-15 seconds. No designer, no editing software.

## What it does

- Text-to-image and image-to-image ad generation (standard and pro-quality models)
- Text-to-video and image-to-video ad generation
- Text-to-music generation for video ads
- Outputs sized for Instagram Stories, Facebook Ads, Google Ads, TikTok, and custom formats
- Fully automated - no human designers involved

## Pricing

- Free: signup credits included, no card required
- Starter: $9.99/month, 70 credits
- Pro: $19.99/month, 200 credits, HD generation, video/music, full commercial usage rights
- Business: $49.99/month, 500 credits
